title: casemap bool param should be Comparator
description: str_is, str_contains, str_matches_glob, str_matches_regex, str_matches_regex_pat, and apply_match (evaluator.rs) all accept a casemap: bool parameter derived from cmp == Comparator::AsciiCasemap. This discards the Comparator type context immediately after extracting it and passes a naked bool through multiple call layers. Idiomatic Rust would pass Comparator (or a newtype) directly, keeping the semantic meaning attached to the value and making call sites self-documenting. A bool cannot communicate whether future comparators exist, whereas the enum can be extended.
